title: Principal Frontend Developer at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Bhopal-based team.

About Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd!
